APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GRAY, JUSTIN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRAY, JUSTIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 468 FELL STREET, APT 6, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,206.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,206.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT DOES NOT VAC BY 12 NOON 4/30/98, THEN SEC DEP IS FORF; IF DEFT VAC BY 12 NOON 4/30/98, THEN PLTF SHALL MOVE TO SET ASIDE JDGMENT & SEC DEP WILL BE DEALT W/ ACCDG TO RENTAL AGREEMENT; DEFT WAIVES ANY & ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PLTF ARISING FROM THIS TENANCY.
